title: Handyman Services in Brooklyn, Queens & Long Island | Jose Does It

hero.headline: HANDYMAN SERVICES IN BROOKLYN, QUEENS & LONG ISLAND

features.title: ON TIME & LOCAL
features.text: I serve Brooklyn, Queens, and Long Island. Most jobs can be done same day or next day. I show up when I say I will and leave the place clean.

features.title: CLEAR PRICING
features.text: See real time and cost estimates on the Price Guide before we start. No surprises. $80 for the first hour, $65 each additional hour.

features.title: QUALITY WORK
features.text: Attention to detail on every job. Check the reviews!
